summary: The diff implements a complete frontend UI with admin dashboard, transaction processing forms, and transaction history components. However, the backend implementation is minimal (only stub types and empty functions). Critical security features like SHA-256 hashing, hash-linked ledger, three-gate validation logic, CSV import, and system lock mechanisms are entirely missing from the backend.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend data model must store all 9 fields (Citizen_ID, Income_Tier, Scheme_Eligibility, Scheme_Amount, Last_Claim_Date, Region_Code, Account_Status, Aadhaar_Linked, Claim_Count) and support CSV import endpoint
missing_requirements.reason: Backend defines minimal types but no actual storage implementation, no CSV import endpoint, and EligibilityRecord only has 8 fields (missing Citizen_ID field in the record itself)

missing_requirements.requirement: ID-Hash Validator must hash every Citizen_ID using SHA-256, maintain hash registry, and block replay attempts
missing_requirements.reason: No SHA-256 hashing implementation found. Backend has CitizenIdHash type defined as Blob but no hashing logic, no hash registry for duplicate detection

missing_requirements.requirement: Immutable hash-linked ledger with 6 fields (Timestamp, Citizen_ID_Hash, Scheme, Amount, Previous_Line_Hash, Current_Line_Hash), hash chain validation, and tamper detection that freezes system
missing_requirements.reason: No ledger data structure defined, no hash chain implementation, no integrity verification logic, no tamper detection mechanism

missing_requirements.requirement: Gate 1 (Eligibility Gate) must validate 6 conditions: Citizen_ID exists, Account_Status=Active, Aadhaar_Linked=TRUE, Scheme_Eligibility matches, Scheme_Amount matches, Claim_Count≤3
missing_requirements.reason: No eligibility validation logic implemented. Backend only has stub functions with no gate validation

missing_requirements.requirement: Gate 2 (Budget Gate) must start at ₹10,00,000, deduct only after approval, reject on insufficient balance, auto-lock at zero
missing_requirements.reason: Backend initializes balance to 1_000_000 but balance variable is immutable (let instead of var), no deduction logic, no budget validation, no auto-lock mechanism

missing_requirements.requirement: Gate 3 (Frequency Gate) must block claims within 30 days of Last_Claim_Date and update date only after successful transaction
missing_requirements.reason: No frequency gate logic, no date comparison, no 30-day blocking implementation

missing_requirements.requirement: Automatic system lock mechanism for 4 conditions: ledger tampering, budget exhaustion, hash chain mismatch, admin manual pause. Must block transactions and provide rejection reason
missing_requirements.reason: systemActive is initialized but never updated, no lock mechanism, no condition monitoring, no rejection reason handling

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin dashboard backend endpoints must provide system status, support emergency pause toggle, return budget remaining, and transaction count
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend dashboard exists but no backend endpoints implemented to support status retrieval, pause functionality, or real-time updates

missing_requirements.requirement: Transaction processing backend must accept Citizen_ID and scheme, execute all three gate validations, return detailed results with rejection reasons, and update transaction history
missing_requirements.reason: requestMoney function is empty stub, no validation execution, no result generation, no transaction history storage

hallucinated_features.description: Frontend implements mock validation gate simulation with hardcoded pass/fail results
hallucinated_features.reason: TransactionForm shows simulated three-gate validation with predetermined outcomes (pass, pass, fail) that are not connected to any backend logic

hallucinated_features.description: Frontend displays mock transaction history with hardcoded sample data
hallucinated_features.reason: TransactionHistory component shows 3 predefined transactions with specific Citizen_IDs, amounts, and rejection reasons that don't come from backend

hallucinated_features.description: isCelebrated function in backend with no corresponding requirement
hallucinated_features.reason: Backend contains unused function isCelebrated that always returns true with no specification in requirements
